calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-18-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arnold W. Evje, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff
Szilvia Sandor, Plaintiff
Sandra Obando, Celia Obando & Winstrong Dynarte, Defendants in propria persona

Settlement Conference held. Case settled. Stipulation for entry of judgment was read into the record as follows:
Restitution and Possession of premises to Plaintiff located at: 878 Capp St. # B, SF, CA.
Forfeiture of rental agreement.
Writ of Possession with no stay of execution.
If Defendants vacate by 3/15/04 at 5pm, Plaintiff will waive back rent and damages and Plaintiff will pay Defendants $1,000.
If Defendants fail to vacate by 3/15/04, Plaintiff will not pay Defendants $1,000 and Defendants will be liable for unpaid rent.
Defendants waive any right to set aside or vacate the judgment or apply for stay or execution or from relief from forfeiture.
Each party to bear its own costs and attorneys fees.
Jury trial vacated.
JPT: Dennis Hyde (503A), Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge
